services.name: BOMManagementService
services.purpose: Owns versioned Bill of Materials, product definitions, component specifications, and material requirements calculations

apis.description: create new BOM version for a product
retrieve specific BOM version with full component hierarchy
get latest BOM version for a product
calculate material requirements for given production quantity
get component specifications and requirements
validate BOM for circular dependencies and completeness

events.description: new BOM version is published and ready for use
component specifications or requirements have been updated

services.name: InventoryService
services.purpose: Tracks stock levels, locations, reservations, and movements for raw materials, components, and finished goods

apis.description: check availability for list of materials with quantities
reserve materials for a production order
allocate reserved materials for immediate use
record stock movements (receipts, consumption, transfers)
get current stock levels and locations for a material
release reserved materials when production completes or cancels
get all stock at a specific location

events.description: stock level changed for a material at a location
materials reserved for production order
material moved between locations or consumed/received
material has fallen below reorder point
new BOM published - may need to track new materials

services.name: ComplianceService
services.purpose: Authorizes and logs all material transfers with audit trail, acting as gatekeeper for material movements

apis.description: authorize material transfer request (currently always approves)
log completed material movement with full context
query audit trail by material, location, time range, or transfer type
validate transfer request against current compliance rules
generate compliance reports for auditing purposes

events.description: material transfer has been authorized and can proceed
material movement has been recorded in audit trail
compliance rule violation detected (future use)
log all inventory movements for audit trail
log material reservations for audit trail

services.name: ProcurementService
services.purpose: Manages supplier relationships, purchase orders, and material purchasing workflows including automated reordering

apis.description: create new purchase order for materials
get purchase order status and details
record goods receipt and update PO status
search supplier catalog for available materials
update supplier performance metrics
create purchase orders for materials below reorder points
get expected delivery schedule for planning

events.description: new purchase order created and sent to supplier
materials ordered with expected delivery date
materials received from supplier and ready for inventory
supplier performance metrics have been updated
material has fallen below reorder point - triggers purchasing
component specs changed - may affect supplier requirements

services.name: WarehouseService
services.purpose: Manages physical receiving, storage, picking, packing, and shipping operations for all materials and products

apis.description: receive goods from suppliers with quality verification
pick materials for production orders
pack and ship finished products to customers
transfer materials between storage locations
reconcile physical vs system inventory counts
query storage location capacity and utilization
schedule dock appointments for receiving/shipping

events.description: materials physically received and stored
materials picked and ready for production
finished products shipped to customer
physical count differs from system inventory
schedule physical receiving of purchased materials
schedule picking for reserved materials
execute authorized material transfers

services.name: ProductionPlanningService
services.purpose: Orchestrates production schedules, work orders, capacity planning, and material requirements planning across all manufacturing resources

apis.description: create production schedule from demand requirements
generate work orders for workshops and assembly lines
create production order with material reservations
check production feasibility against capacity and materials
reschedule production based on delays or constraints
query current capacity utilization across all resources
get production order status and progress

events.description: new production order created with material requirements
work order assigned to workshop or assembly line
production schedule updated due to constraints or delays
capacity bottleneck detected requiring intervention
new BOM affects material requirements planning
stock changes affect production feasibility
material shortage may impact production schedules

services.name: QualityAssuranceService
services.purpose: Manages quality standards, inspection processes, test execution, and quality certifications throughout the manufacturing lifecycle

apis.description: schedule quality inspections for materials, components, or products
record inspection results and quality measurements
query quality history and defect patterns for a material
create or update quality standards and inspection procedures
generate quality certificates for compliant batches
escalate quality failures and trigger corrective actions

events.description: inspection completed with pass/fail results and measurements
quality failure detected requiring corrective action
quality certificate issued enabling material use or shipping
statistical process control violation detected
schedule incoming inspection for received materials
coordinate with physical receipt for inspection scheduling

services.name: MachiningWorkshopService
services.purpose: Manages CNC machines, lathes, mills scheduling and machining work order execution with operator assignments

apis.description: accept machining work order from production planning
schedule work on specific machines or general machining pool
update work order progress through setup, machining, inspection stages
report machine status, downtime, or maintenance requirements
track material consumption, scrap rates, and yield
assign qualified operators to machines and work orders

events.description: machining work completed and component ready for next production stage
machine breakdown or scheduled maintenance affecting production capacity
machining quality problem detected requiring possible rework
raw material consumed in machining process with scrap tracking
work order assigned to machining workshop for execution
quality results may require rework or process adjustments
confirms raw materials available for machining work order

services.name: FabricationWorkshopService
services.purpose: Manages welding stations, cutting equipment, forming machines scheduling and fabrication work order execution with operator certifications

apis.description: accept fabrication work order from production planning
schedule work on specific equipment or general fabrication pool
update work order progress through cutting, forming, welding, finishing stages
report equipment status, downtime, or maintenance requirements
track material consumption, waste rates, and rework
assign certified operators to welding or specialized fabrication processes

events.description: fabrication work completed and component ready for next production stage
equipment breakdown or scheduled maintenance affecting production capacity
fabrication quality problem detected requiring possible rework
material consumed in fabrication process with waste tracking
work order assigned to fabrication workshop for execution
quality results may require rework or process adjustments
confirms materials available for fabrication work order

services.name: AssemblyService
services.purpose: Manages final product assembly line operations, workstation scheduling, and component integration into finished products

apis.description: accept assembly order from production planning
schedule work on assembly lines or workstations
update assembly progress through build stages
report line status, downtime, or bottlenecks
track component consumption and assembly yield
assign operators to specialized assembly tasks

events.description: finished product ready for shipping or final inspection
assembly line downtime affecting production capacity
assembly problem detected requiring possible rework
component consumed in assembly process with yield tracking
work order assigned to assembly line for execution
machined components available for assembly
fabricated components available for assembly
quality results may require rework or process adjustments
confirms all components available for assembly
